query:
-- Verificar quais usuários existem e seus badges atuais
SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(ub.id) as badge_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_badges ub ON u.id = ub.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY u.id;
